description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Manual build binary zip on Windows (x86-64) that can be triggered manually. In a single windows-2022 job, check out the repository, set up a build environment with MSVC, install Python 3.13, and configure the build environment. Then, upgrade pip, build PyInstaller, install Qt, PyQt, numpy, and other required modules. Build Veusz extensions, run tests, and finally build a binary with PyInstaller and upload it as an artifact named portable_zip.
